summary: The live kind web-app Deployment, image build target, task image loading, and docs now use scion-ops-web-app naming. Rendered deploy/kind/control-plane kustomize has no scion-ops-new-ui-eval or new-ui-eval matches and shows image localhost/scion-ops-web-app:latest for the scion-ops-web-app Deployment.
tasks_completed: Renamed the live web app image reference from localhost/scion-ops-new-ui-eval:latest to localhost/scion-ops-web-app:latest in the kind control-plane Deployment.
Renamed the local image build directory and build script target from new-ui-eval terminology to web-app/scion-ops-web-app terminology.
Updated kind task image loading and operator documentation to use localhost/scion-ops-web-app:latest.
Changed the container runtime adapter path to /app/web-app/adapter.py so rendered live manifests no longer contain new-ui-eval/new-ui-evaluation path references.
tests_run: rg -n "scion-ops-new-ui-eval|image-build/new-ui-eval|BUILD_NEW_UI_EVAL|NEW_UI_EVAL_CONTEXT" deploy/kind/control-plane image-build scripts/build-images.sh scripts/kind-scion-runtime.sh Taskfile.yml docs 2>/dev/null || true
